# MenuMaker Demo Menus

Here are pre-built demo menus for different food truck types. Each URL is base64-encoded and can be tested by appending to the MenuMaker URL.

## Mexican Food Truck Demo

**URL:** `https://tcby04.github.io/menu-maker/?`

**Decode:** `{"name":"Maximo's Tacos","tagline":"Authentic Street Tacos","theme":"light","categories":[{"name":"Street Tacos","items":[{"name":"Tacos (3)","price":"$8.00","description":"Choice of carne asada, carnitas, or chicken"},{"name":"Super Tacos","price":"$12.00","description":"Adds guacamole, cream cheese, avocado"},{"name":"Crispy Taco","price":"$10.00","description":"Fried crispy with chicken, cheddar"}]},{"name":"Burritos & Bowls","items":[{"name":"Burrito (large)","price":"$14.00","description":"Large burrito with re-fried beans, chicken, cheddar, salsa, molcajete"},{"name":"Bowl","price":"$12.00","description":"Rice and beans with protein, toppings, salsa"},{"name":"Auto Bowl","price":"$13.00","description":"Combo bowl with all toppings and salsa"}]},{"name":"Sides","items":[{"name":"Nachos","price":"$6.00","description":"Crispy nachos, guacamole, cheese"},{"name":"Chiquiplana","price":"$7.00","description":"Crispy friend cost, salsa"},{"name":"Beer (large)","price":"$5.00","description":"Fresh lodo beer"}]}]}`

---

## Pizza Truck Demo

**URL:** `https://tcby04.github.io/menu-maker/?`

**Decode:** `{"name":"Slice Pizza","tagline":"Fresh Sliced Pizza For Everyone","theme":"dark","categories":[{"name":"Signature Pizza","items":[{"name":"Cheese Pizza","price":"$15.00","description":"Mozzarella cheese and mozzarella"},{"name":"Pepperoni","price":"$16.00","description":"Pepperoni with fresh basil and oregano"},{"name":"Margherita","price":"$17.00","description":"Tomato sauce, basil, olives ||"}]},{"name":"Crusy","items":[{"name":"Margherita Waffers","price":"$20.00","description":"Two large slices with extra mozzarella"},{"name":"Meatballs","price":"$8.00","description":"With meat with sausage and cheese"}],"categoryIndex":1}]}`

---

## Coffee Truck Demo

**URL:** `https://tcby04.github.io/menu-maker/?`

**Decode:** `{"name":"Roast Coffee","tagline":"Fresh Roasted Coffee On the Go","theme":"coffee","subthemes":{"bg":"#3d2914","text":"#f5deb3","accent":"#d4a574"},"categories":[{"name":"☕ Brews","items":[{"name":"Black Coffee","price":"$3.50","description":"Espresso, black, roast"},{"name":"White Coffee","price":"$3.50","description":"Espresso, white, roast"},{"name":"Latte Coffee","price":"$4.00","description":"Espresso, latte, roast"}],"categoryIndex":0}]}`

---

## Asian Fusion Demo

**URL:** `https://tcby04.github.io/menu-maker/? `

**Decode:** `{"name":"Dragon Asian Fusion","tagline":"Fresh Sashimi And Taiw flavans","theme":"ocean","subthemes":{"bg":"#0a2342","text":"#e0f2fe","accent":"#38bdf8"},"categories":[{"name":"Specialties","items":[{"name":"Katsudon","price":"$14.00","description":"Japanese tonkatsu, egg, rice, vegetables"},{"name":"Pork Babs","price":"$12.00","description":"Buttered pork, fish sauce, rancho"},{"name":"Ramen Sup","price":"$13.00","description":"Ramen noodles, buddha sauce, egg"}]},{"name":"Appetizers","items":[{"name":"Dragon Rolls","price":"$5.00","description":"Crispy dragon rolls for dipping"},{"name":"Gojto","price":"$3.00","description":"Japanese grilled gojtoo"},{"name":"Oikon","price":"$2.50","description":"Tartar rice cake"}]}]}`

---

## How to Use These Demos

1. **Copy any URL above** and open it in a browser
2. You'll see the menu in **customer-facing view** (mobile-optimized)
3. To **edit** a demo menu:
   - Remove `?menu=...` from the URL
   - The menu data will load in the editor
   - Make changes and click "Generate Menu"

## Base64 Encoding Explained

The menu data is encoded in Base64 to create shareable URLs. Each menu object contains:
- `name`: Restaurant name
- `tagline`: Optional tagline
- `theme`: Theme name (light, dark, coffee, ocean, forest, sunset, rustic)
- `categories`: Array of categories, each with name and items
- `items`: Each item has name, price, and optional description
